examples.review_snippet: The legal work was fine but their team overcharged and was slow to respond to emails. I've worked with other attorneys who were more proactive. Wouldn't use them again.
The good: Ms. Goldstein clearly knows the law. The bad: response times were slow and the office was sometimes hard to reach. Net result — a fine but unremarkable experience.
I felt dismissed during consultations with Ms. Huang. My questions were answered quickly without much depth. The case resolved okay but I never felt confident in the representation.
Mixed experience with their team. Some of the staff were very helpful, others seemed indifferent. The final result was satisfactory. Might use them again for a simpler matter.
Three stars feels right. Mr. Patel was professional and prepared, but I felt like I could have gotten the same result for less money somewhere else. The value wasn't quite there.
Solid but not spectacular. Mr. Patel handled the basics well but I expected more strategic guidance. For straightforward matters I'd return. For complex litigation I'd look elsewhere.
